Thread.java

00028 permission to link this library with independent modules to produce an
00029 executable, regardless of the license terms of these independent
00030 modules, and to copy and distribute the resulting executable under
00031 terms of your choice, provided that you also meet, for each linked
00032 independent module, the terms and conditions of the license of that
00033 module.  An independent module is a module which is not derived from
00034 or based on this library.  If you modify this library, you may extend
00035 this exception to your version of the library, but you are not
00036 obligated to do so.  If you do not wish to do so, delete this
00037 exception statement from your version. */
00038 
00039 package java.lang;
00040 
00041 import jelatine.VMPointer;
00042 
00079 public class Thread implements Runnable
00080 {
00082     public static final int MIN_PRIORITY = 1;
00083 
00085     public static final int NORM_PRIORITY = 5;
00086 
00088     public static final int MAX_PRIORITY = 10;
00089 
00091     final Runnable runnable;
00092 
00094     volatile String name;
00095 
00097     volatile VMPointer vmThread;
00098 
00100     volatile int priority;
00101 
00103     private static int numAnonymousThreadsCreated = 0;
00104 
00105 
00153     public Thread()
00154     {
00155         this((Runnable) null, createAnonymousThreadName());
00156     }
00157 
00167     public Thread(Runnable target)
00168     {
00169         this(target, createAnonymousThreadName());
00170     }
00171 
00178     public Thread(String name)
00179     {
00180         this(null, name);
00181     }
00182 
00191     public Thread(Runnable target, String name)
00192     {
00193         Thread current = currentThread();
00194 
00195         // Use toString hack to detect null.
00196         this.name = name.toString();
00197         this.runnable = target;
00198 
00199         priority = current.priority;
00200 
00201     }
00202 
00206     private static synchronized String createAnonymousThreadName()
00207     {
00208       return "Thread-" + ++numAnonymousThreadsCreated;
00209     }
00210 
00211 
00220     public native static Thread currentThread();
00221 
00228     public native static void yield();
00229 
00242     public native static void sleep(long ms) throws InterruptedException;
00243 
00253     public synchronized native void start();
00254 
00259     public void run()
00260     {
00261         if (runnable != null)
00262             runnable.run();
00263     }
00264 
00275     public synchronized native void interrupt();
00276 
00283     public final synchronized boolean isAlive()
00284     {
00285         return vmThread != null;
00286     }
00287 
00298     public final synchronized void setPriority(int priority)
00299     {
00300         if (priority < MIN_PRIORITY || priority > MAX_PRIORITY)
00301             throw new IllegalArgumentException();
00302 
00303         this.priority = priority;
00304     }
00305 
00311     public final synchronized int getPriority()
00312     {
00313         return priority;
00314     }
00315 
00321     public final String getName()
00322     {
00323         return name;
00324     }
00325 
00331     public native static int activeCount();
00332 
00339     public native final void join() throws InterruptedException;
00340 
00347     public String toString()
00348     {
00349         return ("Thread[" + name + "," + priority + "]");
00350     }
00351 }
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:24 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
